import io

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut depth = 0
    mut bad = false
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 40
          depth = depth + 1
        else if b == 41
          if depth == 0
            bad = true
          else
            depth = depth - 1
          end
        end
      when None
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if bad
      println("NO")
    else if depth == 0
      println("YES")
    else
      println("NO")
    end
  when None
    println("YES")
  end
end
